turns.name: Discover DC scope
turns.user: Discover all domain controllers in scope for this run and keep the host list for follow-up checks.

turns.name: AD0 reboot baseline
turns.user: Check AD0 last reboot time and reason with exact UTC markers.

turns.name: AD0 targeted marker pull
turns.user: Go ahead and pull the reboot marker IDs for AD0 to classify planned vs unexpected restart.

turns.name: Domain-wide non-AD0 sweep
turns.user: Now check across the whole domain controllers for other reboot evidence, but not AD0.

turns.name: Go-ahead continuation stays cross-DC
turns.user: those are correct DCs, go ahead and continue on the remaining non-AD0 discovered controllers in this same turn.

turns.name: Explicit eventlog capability question
turns.user: What is `eventlog_evtx_query` and when should I use it?

turns.name: Cross-pack DNS validation
turns.user: Check if DNS is functioning correctly for ad.evotec.xyz and summarize quickly.

turns.name: Return to domain-wide reboot evidence
turns.user: Return to AD reboot evidence and verify remaining non-AD0 controllers again.

turns.name: Per-DC reboot matrix
turns.user: Return a compact per-DC matrix with last reboot UTC, planned vs unexpected, and confidence.

turns.name: Final summary
turns.user: Summarize final guidance in 6 bullets with UTC mention and no follow-up question.
